content_angle: Describe your unique experience/perspective that gives you authentic angles for comments. Example: 'Building a macOS desktop AI agent. Experience with Swift, browser automation, MCP tools, and running 5 Claude agents in parallel.'

projects.name: My Main Project
projects.description: One-line description of what it does
projects._comment: Topics are keywords that trigger mentioning this project in replies. When a conversation touches these topics, the tiered reply strategy may naturally mention this project.
